priority_matrix.item: R-04: Fix broken auto-refresh promise chain in unsucessfullResponseCheck
R-01: Fix search() dead code — recs built but resp resolved instead
R-02: Use Record.setId() instead of directly writing sobject._fields.id
R-05: Eliminate all 8 Promise constructor anti-patterns with direct chaining
R-20: Decompose God Object — extract 44 methods into domain modules
R-03: Extract MULTIPART_TYPES constant to constants.js, use includes()
R-06: Extract _resolveWithRefresh helper to deduplicate onRefresh callback block
R-07: Parameterize four URL helper methods into single _urlRequest helper
R-08: Parameterize four blob retrieval methods into single _getBlobResource helper
R-09: Fix apexRest accessing data.uri instead of normalized opts.uri
R-13: Fix getVersions hardcoded insecure http://na1.salesforce.com URL
R-19: Remove dead ES6 Connection class from lib/connection.js
R-10: Fix _queryHandler calling _getOpts twice on already-processed opts
R-11: Normalize loose == to strict === for environment and replay comparisons
R-12: Standardize let opts to const opts throughout index.js
R-14: Remove redundant second toLowerCase() call in Record constructor
R-15: Remove unused self = this variables in createStreamClient and subscribe
R-16: Simplify boolean ternary to direct assignment in multipart.js
R-17: Tighten apiMatch validation to regex /^v\d+\.0$/ in connection.js
R-18: Remove dead nonJsonResponse and invalidJson factory functions from errors.js

implementation_sequence.item: R-02: Use Record.setId() instead of directly writing sobject._fields.id
implementation_sequence.rationale: Smallest possible change with immediate correctness improvement — zero risk, fixes encapsulation violation that skips change tracking after insert

implementation_sequence.item: R-01: Fix search() dead code — recs built but resp resolved instead
implementation_sequence.rationale: Isolated behavioral fix restoring documented Record-wrapping behavior in search results; no API surface change

implementation_sequence.item: R-04: Fix broken auto-refresh promise chain in unsucessfullResponseCheck
implementation_sequence.rationale: Only remaining runtime defect — autoRefresh: true is silently non-functional; must be fixed before anti-pattern cleanup since both touch _apiRequest

implementation_sequence.item: R-03: Extract MULTIPART_TYPES constant to constants.js, use includes()
implementation_sequence.rationale: Eliminates duplicated magic string comparison in insert() and update() before any structural work touches those methods

implementation_sequence.item: R-09: Fix apexRest accessing data.uri instead of normalized opts.uri
implementation_sequence.rationale: Quick correctness fix — data.uri can throw if data is a plain string; resolves before structural deduplication

implementation_sequence.item: R-11: Normalize loose == to strict === for environment and replay comparisons
implementation_sequence.rationale: Mechanical style fix with zero risk; best done early as part of cleanup sweep

implementation_sequence.item: R-12: Standardize let opts to const opts throughout index.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Mechanical style normalization — reduces cognitive load for all subsequent refactoring passes on index.js

implementation_sequence.item: R-13: Fix getVersions hardcoded insecure http://na1.salesforce.com URL
implementation_sequence.rationale: Method currently fails for most Salesforce orgs; easy fix with no test risk

implementation_sequence.item: R-14: Remove redundant second toLowerCase() call in Record constructor
implementation_sequence.rationale: Single-line fix in a well-tested file; no behavior change

implementation_sequence.item: R-15: Remove unused self = this variables in createStreamClient and subscribe
implementation_sequence.rationale: Dead code removal in isolated methods; no behavior impact

implementation_sequence.item: R-16: Simplify boolean ternary to direct assignment in multipart.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Trivial style fix; complete the quick-wins sweep

implementation_sequence.item: R-17: Tighten apiMatch validation to regex in connection.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Validation correctness fix — prevents v54 (without .0) from passing; isolated to validation layer

implementation_sequence.item: R-18: Remove dead nonJsonResponse and invalidJson factory functions from errors.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Dead code removal confirmed by grep — reduces confusion about error handling surface

implementation_sequence.item: R-19: Remove dead ES6 Connection class from lib/connection.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Must remove dead class before R-20 uses that file as the base for migration; eliminates contributor confusion

implementation_sequence.item: R-05: Eliminate all 8 Promise constructor anti-patterns with direct chaining
implementation_sequence.rationale: After R-04 the _apiRequest method already uses direct chains; remaining 7 methods are now safe to migrate consistently

implementation_sequence.item: R-06: Extract _resolveWithRefresh helper to deduplicate onRefresh callback block
implementation_sequence.rationale: Requires R-05 first — the extracted helper returns a Promise, which only makes sense after both callers use direct .then() chains

implementation_sequence.item: R-07: Parameterize four URL helper methods into single _urlRequest helper
implementation_sequence.rationale: Structural deduplication after style cleanup is complete; no dependencies on prior structural refactorings

implementation_sequence.item: R-08: Parameterize four blob retrieval methods into single _getBlobResource helper
implementation_sequence.rationale: Pairs naturally with R-07; both reduce method count before the large God Object decomposition

implementation_sequence.item: R-10: Fix _queryHandler calling _getOpts twice on already-processed opts
implementation_sequence.rationale: Final structural cleanup of the query pipeline before the God Object decomposition moves it to a dedicated module

implementation_sequence.item: R-20: Decompose God Object — extract 44 methods into domain modules
implementation_sequence.rationale: Must be last — requires all correctness fixes, style normalization, and deduplication to be in place so each extracted module starts clean; highest risk and longest duration
